repo_prior_art.cite: exp_saturation_skew_threshold_v1 concerns a scalar saturation moment threshold, not assignment-covariance implementability for interference designs

published_prior_art.cite: ThiyageswaranKokotBrennanMeilaYuFazel2026 optimizes the covariance SDP, but does not isolate this two-block relaxed/implementable symmetrization

ThiyageswaranKokotBrennanMeilaYuFazel2026 gives SDP plus Gaussian rounding and VivianoLeiImbensKarrerSchrijversShi2026 gives cluster-design objectives, but neither gives a zero-loss cut-attainment cell for this covariance relaxation

ThiyageswaranKokotBrennanMeilaYuFazel2026 Proposition 7 shows the robustness penalty drives the relaxed optimizer toward Bernoulli randomization as the penalty grows, but not a finite two-block exactness frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure_v1 and pid_network_random_set_v1 give shared-law feasibility lessons, not elliptope-versus-plus-minus-one covariance gap results

published_prior_art.cite: ChenLiDengWang2024 notes covariance legitimacy constraints and HuberMaric2017 identifies the Bernoulli cut-polytope substrate, but neither proves a causal-design positive implementability-gap window
HuberMaric2017 gives abstract realizability and GoemansWilliamson1995-style rounding gives one-sided approximation machinery, not a sharp r_star/rho_star phase certificate for this objective

accepted_scope_caveats.label: oeq:sharp-phase-boundary
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The exact r_star boundary and rho_star rounding-loss certificate are posed as an open-ended construction target rather than as delivered theorem content.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The accepted field-tier claim is the symmetry reduction, two exact corner cells, and a positive implementability-gap window; the full iff phase diagram remains the Stage 0 construction route.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add explicit candidate formulas or named finite-dimensional dual programs for kappa_cut, r_cut, kappa_iid, r_gap^- and r_gap^+ so the phase cells are auditable from primitives.
Include a worked m=2 or m=3 exhibit computing E_m^blk, C_m^pm, F_{r,kappa}, and Delta_m^pm to show the proposed implementability gap before the general proof.
State precisely how the finite kappa_iid frontier strengthens ThiyageswaranKokotBrennanMeilaYuFazel2026 Proposition 7, which is a large-robustness Bernoulli-limit result.
Add a boundary corollary distinguishing the zero-loss cut cell from the positive-gap window in terms of the observable block parameters u and v.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0: the kernel clears the field novelty floor, with the sharp iff boundary honestly scoped as an open-ended construction target.
